title: Standard refund window
body: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of the purchase date when the service has not been fully consumed.

title: Cancellation effective timing
body: Cancellation requests become effective immediately after confirmation and prevent future billing cycles.

title: Manager approval exception
body: Any exception to a published billing or reimbursement rule requires documented manager approval before the exception is applied.

title: Password reset propagation
body: After a password reset, account access updates can take up to 24 hours to propagate across all channels.

title: Eligibility confirmation window
body: Eligibility changes are confirmed within 7 business days after all required documents are received.

title: Travel reimbursement deadline
body: Travel reimbursement requests must be submitted within 60 days of trip completion.

title: Supporting document deadline
body: Supporting documents must be submitted within 10 calendar days of the request date.

title: Sensitive case escalation
body: Sensitive account changes and identity disputes must be escalated to the policy desk within 2 hours.

title: Overtime approval rule
body: Overtime must be pre-approved by a manager before hours are worked.

title: Receipt requirement threshold
body: Receipts are required for reimbursement claims of 25 dollars or more.

title: Service credit expiration
body: Unused service credits expire 45 days after they are issued.

title: VPN credential resynchronization
body: When VPN access fails after a password reset, clear cached credentials, confirm multifactor enrollment, and retry from the managed VPN client.
